title: Automotive System Engineer | ADAS & Multi-Sensor Fusion
description:
• Up to S$6,000 Basic + Variable Bonus + AWS.

  • Tampines North

  • Monday – Friday | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM.

  • S$950/year Flexible Benefits + Company Van provided (Drive-back subject to approval).

  • Automotive Vision Systems, ADAS, and Situational Awareness.

Join a cutting-edge team at the forefront of automotive innovation. We specialize in developing and integrating multi-sensor fusion systems—combining Camera, LiDAR, and Ultrasonic technologies—to enhance vehicle safety and situational awareness. As a System Engineer, you will be the technical architect responsible for bridging high-level design with hands-on vehicle implementation, ensuring that the next generation of ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance Systems) operates flawlessly in real-world conditions.

Responsibilities:

  • Develop detailed designs to integrate multi-modal sensor data into a unified vision system for ADAS.

  • Oversee the installation, configuration, and programming of components to ensure end-to-end functionality.

  • Conduct system-level debugging, performance tuning, and root cause analysis for both hardware and software issues.

  • Partner with project managers and installation teams to ensure projects are delivered on schedule and meet strict performance standards.

  • Conduct rigorous vehicle testing and data logging to validate system performance and safety.

  • Maintain detailed records (system diagrams, manuals) and train clients/internal teams on the operation of newly installed technologies.

  • Ensure all integrations comply with international automotive industry standards and safety regulations.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical & Electronic Engineering, Mechatronics, Computer Science, or a related field.

  • 3+ years in system integration (Automotive or Robotics preferred).

  • Strong grasp of Sensor Technologies (LiDAR, Radar, Camera) and Sensor Fusion.

    • Familiarity with automotive protocols (CAN, Ethernet).

    • Knowledge of AI/ML perception systems and vehicle dynamics.

  • Comfortable working at heights or in confined spaces for vehicle installations.

  • Excellent cross-functional collaboration skills; ability to deliver technical training sessions.

  • A valid driver's license is preferred but not mandatory.

Please indicate the following information in your resume:

  • Current & Expected salary.

  • Years of experience in ADAS/Robotics.

  • Availability to commence work.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.
